primary_angle.title: 40.35mm exact. 0.7mm lip. FKM rubber.
primary_angle.core_message: The Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered to match the Royal Pop’s 40.35mm case with a 0.7mm retaining lip for a secure, scratch-free fit. Made from FKM rubber for durability and premium feel—no generic straps, no guesswork.
primary_angle.why_this_wins: Addresses the top audience tension (fear of poor fit/low-quality materials) with exact specs and material transparency. Differentiates from competitors flooding the market with vague claims.
primary_angle.audience: Royal Pop owners and watch enthusiasts who prioritize precision engineering and premium build quality.
primary_angle.desired_reaction: Trust in the adapter’s fit and material quality. Urgency to secure a spot before generic alternatives dominate.

supporting_angle.title: Five colourways. One perfect fit.
supporting_angle.purpose: Reinforce product variations (today’s calendar focus) while maintaining premium positioning. Highlight exclusivity and design-led choices without diluting the engineering-first lead angle.

content_decision.goal: Showcase the Cradle Adapter V1’s engineering precision and material quality in a 15–30s teaser. Use close-ups of the 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm lip, and FKM rubber texture to build trust.
content_decision.hook_direction: Engineering-first reveal: Open with a tight shot of the Royal Pop clicking into the adapter, followed by a side-by-side comparison of the adapter’s specs vs. a generic strap.
content_decision.conversion_role: Drive waitlist signups by positioning the adapter as the premium alternative to low-effort knockoffs.

creative_direction.tone: Premium, direct, and slightly obsessive about fit and finish. Avoid hype; focus on calm confidence in engineering details.
creative_direction.pace: Fast cuts (1–2s per shot) to maintain energy, but slow down for spec reveals (e.g., 0.7mm lip measurement).
creative_direction.visual_energy: High contrast: crisp macro shots of the adapter against the Royal Pop’s case. Use a neutral background to emphasize the product.
must_show: 40.35mm socket measurement (on-screen text or caliper shot)
Royal Pop clicking into adapter (satisfying sound design)
must_not_do: Show the adapter on a wrist without the Royal Pop (misleading)
Imply affiliation with Swatch or AP

success_metric.secondary: Engagement rate (likes/comments/shares) on spec-focused moments (e.g., 0.7mm lip reveal)

brief_for_copy.script_goal: Compress the engineering specs into a 3-second hook, then expand into material and colourway details. End with a clear CTA to pre-order.
brief_for_copy.caption_goal: Reinforce the adapter’s precision fit and premium material. Use bullet points for specs (e.g., ‘• 40.35mm socket’) and tease the five colourways. Include the legal disclaimer.
brief_for_copy.cta_language: ‘Pre-Order Now’ (exact wording from website truth). Avoid urgency language like ‘limited time’—focus on scarcity of the first batch.
proof_points_to_include: 40.35mm inner socket (exact Royal Pop case fit)
Five colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso)

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
